title: China's New AI Model Halts New Subscriptions As Demand Swamps Capacity - Slashdot
excerpt: Moonshot AI has temporarily paused new subscriptions for its Kimi K3 model after demand surged beyond the company's current capacity within days of the launch. The open-source Chinese AI model, described as one of the largest of its kind at 2.8 trillion parameters, has rattled U.S. rivals by beating...
content_html:
Moonshot AI has temporarily paused new subscriptions for its Kimi K3 model after demand surged beyond the company's current capacity within days of the launch. The open-source Chinese AI model, described as one of the largest of its kind at 2.8 trillion parameters, has rattled U.S. rivals by beating Anthropic's Fable 5 and OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol in front-end coding tests. The Associated Press reports: "Kimi K3 has received far more love than we expected," Moonshot AI, which is Beijing-based, wrote in a X post late on Sunday. "Over the past 48 hours, demand has pushed close to the limits of our current capacity." Moonshot said that it's prioritizing existing subscribers and would be temporarily pausing new ones. "We're adding capacity as fast as we can and will reopen new subscription spots in batches," it added. The AI startup also posted a similar message on Chinese social media.

"New model releases generally trigger massive interest, which can strain existing compute infrastructure," said Lian Jye Su, a chief analyst at the technology research and advisory group Omdia. "This does show Moonshot AI does not have sufficient compute chips to serve the current surge in demand." Su said that the key reason was more likely due to Moonshot not fully anticipating the surge in K3's popularity. K3 is "very demanding" in terms of compute requirements, he said, making compute allocation challenging and expensive.

The open-source Chinese AI model, described as one of the largest of its kind at 2.8 trillion parameters, has rattled U.S. rivals by beating Anthropic's Fable 5 and OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol in front-end coding tests. The Associated Press reports: "Kimi K3 has received far more love than we expected," Moonshot AI, which is Beijing-based, wrote in a X post late on Sunday. "Over the past 48 hours, demand has pushed close to the limits of our current capacity." Moonshot said that it's prioritizing existing subscribers and would be temporarily pausing new ones. "We're adding capacity as fast as we can and will reopen new subscription spots in batches," it added. The AI startup also posted a similar message on Chinese social media. "New model releases generally trigger massive interest, which can strain existing compute infrastructure," said Lian Jye Su, a chief analyst at the technology research and advisory group Omdia. "This does show Moonshot AI does not have sufficient compute chips to serve the current surge in demand." Su said that the key reason was more likely due to Moonshot not fully anticipating the surge in K3's popularity. K3 is "very demanding" in terms of compute requirements, he said, making compute allocation challenging and expensive.

blocks.html_en:
Moonshot AI has temporarily paused new subscriptions for its Kimi K3 model after demand surged beyond the company's current capacity within days of the launch. The open-source Chinese AI model, described as one of the largest of its kind at 2.8 trillion parameters, has rattled U.S. rivals by beating Anthropic's Fable 5 and OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol in front-end coding tests. The Associated Press reports: "Kimi K3 has received far more love than we expected," Moonshot AI, which is Beijing-based, wrote in a X post late on Sunday. "Over the past 48 hours, demand has pushed close to the limits of our current capacity." Moonshot said that it's prioritizing existing subscribers and would be temporarily pausing new ones. "We're adding capacity as fast as we can and will reopen new subscription spots in batches," it added. The AI startup also posted a similar message on Chinese social media.

"New model releases generally trigger massive interest, which can strain existing compute infrastructure," said Lian Jye Su, a chief analyst at the technology research and advisory group Omdia. "This does show Moonshot AI does not have sufficient compute chips to serve the current surge in demand." Su said that the key reason was more likely due to Moonshot not fully anticipating the surge in K3's popularity. K3 is "very demanding" in terms of compute requirements, he said, making compute allocation challenging and expensive.

sentences.en: Moonshot AI has temporarily paused new subscriptions for its Kimi K3 model after demand surged beyond the company's current capacity within days of the launch.
sentences.zh: Moonshot AI 已暂时停止其 Kimi K3 型号的新订阅，因为在推出后几天内需求激增超出了该公司当前的容量。

sentences.en: The open-source Chinese AI model, described as one of the largest of its kind at 2.8 trillion parameters, has rattled U.S. rivals by beating Anthropic's Fable 5 and OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol in front-end coding tests.
sentences.zh: 这个开源的中国人工智能模型被描述为同类中最大的模型之一，拥有 2.8 万亿个参数，在前端编码测试中击败了 Anthropic 的 Fable 5 和 OpenAI 的 GPT-5.6 Sol，令美国竞争对手感到不安。

sentences.en: The Associated Press reports: "Kimi K3 has received far more love than we expected," Moonshot AI, which is Beijing-based, wrote in a X post late on Sunday.
sentences.zh: 美联社报道称：“Kimi K3 受到的喜爱远远超出了我们的预期，”总部位于北京的 Moonshot AI 在周日晚些时候的 X 帖子中写道。

sentences.en: "Over the past 48 hours, demand has pushed close to the limits of our current capacity."
sentences.zh: “过去 48 小时内，需求已接近我们当前产能的极限。”

sentences.en: Moonshot said that it's prioritizing existing subscribers and would be temporarily pausing new ones.
sentences.zh: Moonshot 表示，它会优先考虑现有订阅者，并将暂时停止新订阅者。

sentences.en: "We're adding capacity as fast as we can and will reopen new subscription spots in batches," it added.
sentences.zh: 它补充说：“我们正在尽快增加容量，并将分批重新开放新的订阅点。”

sentences.en: The AI startup also posted a similar message on Chinese social media.
sentences.zh: 这家人工智能初创公司也在中国社交媒体上发布了类似的信息。

sentences.en: "New model releases generally trigger massive interest, which can strain existing compute infrastructure," said Lian Jye Su, a chief analyst at the technology research and advisory group Omdia.
sentences.zh: 技术研究和咨询集团 Omdia 的首席分析师 Lian Jye Su 表示：“新模型的发布通常会引发巨大的兴趣，这可能会给现有的计算基础设施带来压力。”

sentences.en: "This does show Moonshot AI does not have sufficient compute chips to serve the current surge in demand."
sentences.zh: “这确实表明 Moonshot AI 没有足够的计算芯片来满足当前激增的需求。”

sentences.en: Su said that the key reason was more likely due to Moonshot not fully anticipating the surge in K3's popularity.
sentences.zh: 苏表示，关键原因更有可能是Moonshot没有充分预见到K3人气的飙升。

sentences.en: K3 is "very demanding" in terms of compute requirements, he said, making compute allocation challenging and expensive.
sentences.zh: 他表示，K3 在计算要求方面“非常苛刻”，这使得计算分配具有挑战性且成本高昂。

blocks.html_en: "New model releases generally trigger massive interest, which can strain existing compute infrastructure," said Lian Jye Su, a chief analyst at the technology research and advisory group Omdia. "This does show Moonshot AI does not have sufficient compute chips to serve the current surge in demand." Su said that the key reason was more likely due to Moonshot not fully anticipating the surge in K3's popularity. K3 is "very demanding" in terms of compute requirements, he said, making compute allocation challenging and expensive.

sentences.en: "New model releases generally trigger massive interest, which can strain existing compute infrastructure," said Lian Jye Su, a chief analyst at the technology research and advisory group Omdia.
sentences.zh: 技术研究和咨询集团 Omdia 的首席分析师 Lian Jye Su 表示：“新模型的发布通常会引发巨大的兴趣，这可能会给现有的计算基础设施带来压力。”

sentences.en: "This does show Moonshot AI does not have sufficient compute chips to serve the current surge in demand."
sentences.zh: “这确实表明 Moonshot AI 没有足够的计算芯片来满足当前激增的需求。”

sentences.en: Su said that the key reason was more likely due to Moonshot not fully anticipating the surge in K3's popularity.
sentences.zh: 苏表示，关键原因更有可能是Moonshot没有充分预见到K3人气的飙升。

sentences.en: K3 is "very demanding" in terms of compute requirements, he said, making compute allocation challenging and expensive.
sentences.zh: 他表示，K3 在计算要求方面“非常苛刻”，这使得计算分配具有挑战性且成本高昂。

content_html_zh: Moonshot AI 已暂时停止其 Kimi K3 型号的新订阅，因为在推出后几天内需求激增超出了该公司当前的容量。 这个开源的中国人工智能模型被描述为同类中最大的模型之一，拥有 2.8 万亿个参数，在前端编码测试中击败了 Anthropic 的 Fable 5 和 OpenAI 的 GPT-5.6 Sol，令美国竞争对手感到不安。 美联社报道称：“Kimi K3 受到的喜爱远远超出了我们的预期，”总部位于北京的 Moonshot AI 在周日晚些时候的 X 帖子中写道。 “过去 48 小时内，需求已接近我们当前产能的极限。” Moonshot 表示，它会优先考虑现有订阅者，并将暂时停止新订阅者。 它补充说：“我们正在尽快增加容量，并将分批重新开放新的订阅点。” 这家人工智能初创公司也在中国社交媒体上发布了类似的信息。 技术研究和咨询集团 Omdia 的首席分析师 Lian Jye Su 表示：“新模型的发布通常会引发巨大的兴趣，这可能会给现有的计算基础设施带来压力。” “这确实表明 Moonshot AI 没有足够的计算芯片来满足当前激增的需求。” 苏表示，关键原因更有可能是Moonshot没有充分预见到K3人气的飙升。 他表示，K3 在计算要求方面“非常苛刻”，这使得计算分配具有挑战性且成本高昂。
